allow: Bash(python -c "from dcim.models import Device, FrontPort, RearPort, Cable; print\('ok'\)")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox bash -c "curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/plugins/innovace-fibre/racks/ -H 'Accept: application/json' | python3 -m json.tool")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox bash -c "python3 -c 'import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen\(\\"http://localhost:8080/api/plugins/innovace-fibre/racks/\\"\); print\(r.read\(\).decode\(\)\)'")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox bash -c "cd /opt/netbox/netbox && python /tmp/check.py" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox bash -c "ps aux | grep gunicorn | head -5")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox bash -c "cat /proc/1/cmdline | tr '\\0' ' '")
Bash(python -c "from extras.models import CustomField, CustomFieldChoiceSet; from extras.choices import CustomFieldTypeChoices; print\('OK'\)")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox python /opt/netbox/netbox/manage.py setup_cable_custom_fields 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox python -c "from extras.models import CustomField; cf = CustomField\(\); print\([f.name for f in cf._meta.get_fields\(\)]\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox python /opt/netbox/netbox/manage.py shell -c "from extras.models import CustomField; print\(hasattr\(CustomField, 'unique'\)\); cf = CustomField.__new__\(CustomField\); print\([f.name for f in cf._meta.get_fields\(\) if 'unique' in f.name.lower\(\)]\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T netbox python /opt/netbox/netbox/manage.py collectstatic --no-input 2>&1)
